name: memory
description: Use Memory by Aictx as local project memory in AI coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Query and save product-layer project memory with Memory.
interface.longDescription: Packages the Memory by Aictx workflow as a Codex skill. Agents stay CLI-first, query project memory on demand mid-task, save product-meaningful changes, and sync memory at session end.
defaultPrompt: Set up Memory for this repo.
Decide whether this task changed Memory.
